title: Delicate Yeasty Uruguayan Dough Bake
description: A traditional Uruguayan dish with a yeasty and velvety texture, featuring mixed peel and a wood-fired bake, also friendly to gluten-free diets.

ingredients.name: gluten-free flour
ingredients.notes: containing rice flour, potato starch, and tapioca flour

instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
Add the mixed peel, eggs, milk, and melted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Place the dough in a greased baking dish and let it rise for 30 minutes.
Bake the dough in the preheated wood-fired oven for 25 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the Delicate Yeasty Uruguayan Dough Bake warm and enjoy.
